ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "constituencies" (
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constituency */,
  "constituency_name" TEXT /* Name of the constituency */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Reference to the state the constituency belongs to */,
  "constituency_type" TEXT /* Type of constituency (e.g., General, Reserved, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constituencies_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the party */,
  "party_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the party */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Leader of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "candidate_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the candidate */,
  "candidate_age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "candidate_educational_qualification" TEXT /* Educational qualification of the candidate */,
  "candidate_criminal_history" TEXT /* Criminal history of the candidate (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year the election was held */,
  "election_month" INTEGER /* Month the election was held */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., General, By-election, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_constituencies" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constituency */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the constituency in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id", "constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_constituencies" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constituency */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id", "constituency_id", "election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constituency */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total votes polled by the candidate */,
  "vote_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes polled by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official */,
  "official_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the official leading the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates_teams" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party */,
  "representative_name" TEXT /* Name of the representative */,
  "representative_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_representatives_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_candidate_links" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., Official, Supporter, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id", "candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_versions_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics data */,
  "analytics_data" TEXT /* Analytics data (e.g., voter turnout, vote share, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_analytics_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the state the constituency belongs to
Type of constituency (e.g., General, Reserved, etc.)
Reference to the party the candidate belongs to
